meta.description: Common composition patterns for the MSM Portal.

patterns.name: Basic Form Pattern
patterns.description: Standard Formik form with panels, field groups, and actions.
patterns.when: Any form that collects user input

page.location: N/A — form-basic is embedded within a Container or another Component

container.responsibility: Provides initialValues, validationSchema, onSubmit handler, and error handling

component.responsibility: Renders Formik form with panels, field groups, and actions. Pure UI.

validation_checklist: Form component receives initialValues and onSubmit via props — no data fetching inside
Yup validation schema defined in a separate file or co-located constant
All field labels use t() from useTranslation
MCFormActions contains Cancel and Submit buttons
Submit button has disabled={isSubmitting} to prevent double submission
All form fields are inside <Formik> context — no uncontrolled inputs

form_structure.validation: Yup schema in separate file ({entity}FormSchema.ts) or inline constant
form_structure.submission: onSubmit prop passed from Container, typed as MTFormikOnSubmit<MT{Entity}FormValues>
form_structure.error_handling: Field-level validation via Yup on blur; submission errors handled by Container via fireCollapsibleError

patterns.name: Full-Page Form Pattern
patterns.description: Use MCFormLayout for full-screen form pages with header breadcrumbs and footer actions.
patterns.when: Creating or editing entities that need their own page (campaigns, ads, etc.)

page.responsibility: Thin wrapper, imports and renders Container

container.responsibility: Data fetching for form dependencies, mutation setup, navigation, error handling. Wraps Component in MCFormLayout.

component.responsibility: Pure Formik form UI with panels and fields. Receives initialValues, onSubmit, and mode via props.

validation_checklist: Page file only imports and renders Container — no hooks, no logic
Container wraps form in MCFormLayout with breadCrumbs and onClose
Container handles all data fetching for form dependencies
Container provides onSubmit handler with mutation, success toast, and navigation
MCFormLayout receives footerContent with Cancel and Submit buttons
Form component is reusable for both create and edit via mode prop
All user-facing strings use t() from useTranslation
Error states handled with fireCollapsibleError in Container

form_structure.validation: Yup schema in separate file ({entity}FormSchema.ts) or inline constant
form_structure.submission: tRPC or msmAPI mutation in Container, passed as onSubmit prop to Form component
form_structure.error_handling: fireCollapsibleError in Container's catch block; field-level Yup validation on blur

patterns.name: Styled Component Pattern
patterns.description: Always use styled-components with theme tokens. Never hardcode values or use inline styles.
rules: Always use SC prefix for internal styled components
Use $ prefix on props that must NOT be forwarded to the DOM (transient props)
Never hardcode color, spacing, or typography values
Never use inline styles

component.responsibility: Defines SC-prefixed styled components with theme tokens for spacing, color, and typography

validation_checklist: All styled components use SC prefix (e.g., SCContainer, SCWrapper)
No hardcoded color values — use props.theme.mcui.palette.*
No hardcoded spacing values — use props.theme.mcui.spacing(n)
No hardcoded typography — use props.theme.mcui.typography.*
Props that should not forward to DOM use $ prefix (transient props, e.g., $isActive)
No inline styles (style={{}}) — use styled-components instead
Component file does not import raw CSS or SCSS files

patterns.name: Action Button Pattern
patterns.description: Per-row actions in tables and lists using MCMoreActionsButton.
patterns.when: Table rows or list items need contextual actions

container.responsibility: Defines action items array with labels, icons, and onClick handlers (navigation, dialog open, mutations)

component.responsibility: Renders MCMoreActionsButton with action items passed via props. Pure UI.

validation_checklist: MCMoreActionsButton used with moreActionItems prop — not custom dropdown
Each action item has label, icon, and onClick defined
Action labels use t() from useTranslation for i18n
Destructive actions (delete) open a confirmation dialog — not immediate mutation
Button has accessible label via aria-label or visible text
Keyboard accessible — menu opens with Enter/Space, items navigable with arrow keys
Icons are consistent with design system conventions (edit, trash, copy, etc.)

patterns.name: Delete Confirmation Dialog Pattern
patterns.description: Standard confirmation dialog for destructive actions.

page.location: N/A — dialog is rendered within a Container that owns the delete action

container.responsibility: Owns dialog open/close state, delete mutation, success/error handling, query invalidation

component.responsibility: Pure dialog UI. Receives open, onClose, onConfirm, entityName via props.

validation_checklist: Dialog state (open/close) managed via useState in Container
Delete mutation uses tRPC or msmAPI in Container
On success: fireSuccess toast, invalidate list query, close dialog
On error: fireCollapsibleError with summary and error object
Confirmation message includes entity name for clarity
All user-facing strings (title, message, button labels) use t() from useTranslation
Cancel button calls onClose — does not trigger delete
Delete button shows loading state during mutation (disabled={isDeleting})

patterns.name: Field Layout Pattern
patterns.description: Control field width and group direction.
patterns.code:
import { MCFormFieldGroup, MCFormField, MEFormFieldWidth } from '@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared';

// Vertical stack (default)
<MCFormFieldGroup>
  <MCFormTextInput name="firstName" fieldLabel="First Name" required />
  <MCFormTextInput name="lastName" fieldLabel="Last Name" required />
</MCFormFieldGroup>

// Horizontal row
<MCFormFieldGroup $direction="row">
  <MCFormTextInput name="startDate" fieldLabel="Start Date" required />
  <MCFormTextInput name="endDate" fieldLabel="End Date" />
</MCFormFieldGroup>

// Reduced width field
<MCFormField $width={MEFormFieldWidth.MEDIUM}>
  <MCFormTextInput name="code" fieldLabel="Promo Code" />
</MCFormField>

component.responsibility: Renders form fields using MCFormFieldGroup for grouping, MCFormField for width control, and fieldLabel prop on each input

validation_checklist: Every form input has a fieldLabel prop for accessible labeling
MCFormFieldGroup wraps related fields — $direction='row' for horizontal layout
MCFormField with $width={MEFormFieldWidth.MEDIUM|SMALL} used for reduced-width fields
Required fields have required prop set — renders asterisk via MCFormFieldLabel
Error messages display automatically via Formik meta.error and meta.touched
Field groups are inside MCFormPanelBody, which is inside MCFormPanel

patterns.name: Tab Navigation Pattern
patterns.description: Tab-based content switching within a page.

page.responsibility: Thin wrapper that renders the container owning the tab state

container.responsibility: Manages active tab state via useState or useSearchParams, defines tab array with labels and onClick handlers, conditionally renders tab content panels

component.responsibility: Each tab content panel fetches its own data and renders its own UI

validation_checklist: MCBarTabs component used for tab rendering — not custom tab implementation
Tab state synced to URL via useSearchParams for shareable URLs
Default tab selected when no tab query param present (e.g., ?? 'available')
Tab labels use t() from useTranslation for i18n
Each tab panel is a separate sub-container with independent data fetching
Inactive tab panels are not rendered (conditional rendering, not hidden via CSS)
tabs array memoized with useMemo to prevent unnecessary re-renders

patterns.name: tRPC Data Fetching Pattern
patterns.description: Type-safe data fetching with tRPC and TanStack React Query.

container.responsibility: Calls tRPC useQuery/useMutation hooks, manages loading/error states, passes fetched data to Component as props

component.responsibility: Receives data via props from Container. Pure UI rendering — no tRPC calls, no useQuery, no useMutation.
imports: MC* UI components only — no trpc import

validation_checklist: All tRPC useQuery/useMutation calls are in Container layer — never in Component
Loading state handled: isLoading check renders MCCircularLoader or MCLoader
Error state handled: useEffect watching query.error calls fireCollapsibleError
Mutation onSuccess invalidates relevant queries via queryClient.invalidateQueries
Mutation errors caught in try/catch with fireCollapsibleError
Data passed to Component as typed props — Component never imports trpc
useQuery options (enabled, refetchInterval, etc.) configured appropriately

patterns.name: Provider Stack
patterns.description: Full provider hierarchy at app root. Order matters.

root.responsibility: Composes all providers in the correct nesting order. This is the application entry point that wraps the entire component tree.

file_checklist: src/apps/{client}/App.tsx (app entry point with provider composition)
src/app-builder/MCApp.tsx (shared app builder if using app-builder pattern)
validation_checklist: All required providers present: QueryClientProvider, FeatureGuardProvider, AuthProvider, MCTRPCProvider, AppConfigProvider, I18nextProvider, ThemeProvider, MCInAppAlertProvider
Nesting order matches the documented order — QueryClientProvider outermost, MCRootLayout innermost
MCGlobalStyle rendered inside ThemeProvider (needs theme context)
MCInAppAlertProvider wraps router so alerts persist across navigation
BrowserRouter wraps MCRootLayout so routes have router context
QueryClient instantiated outside component or in useMemo to prevent re-creation on re-render
No provider is duplicated in the tree

patterns.name: List Page Pattern
patterns.description: Standard list page with title, create button, tabs, and content area. Uses MCContentLayout.
patterns.when: Building a page that lists entities with tabs and a create button

page.responsibility: Thin wrapper, imports and renders MC{Entity}ListContainer

container.responsibility: Tab switching, create-button navigation, i18n. Delegates per-tab data fetching to sub-containers.

component.responsibility: Pure UI table cell renderers and column definitions. No data fetching.

validation_checklist: Page file only imports and renders Container — no hooks, no logic
Container handles tab state via useSearchParams
Container uses useTranslation('container.{entity}.list') for i18n
Create button navigates via generatePathForRoute(MERouteKey.{ENTITY}_CREATE, params)
Sub-containers handle per-tab data fetching via tRPC or msmAPI
Table container uses MCI18nTable with columns, data, filters, hiddenColumns
Error states handled with useEffect watching query.error and fireCollapsibleError
Cell renderers are pure components — no hooks, no side effects

patterns.name: Detail Page Pattern
patterns.description: Entity detail page with dependent queries, loading/error states, and a presentation component.
patterns.when: Building a page that shows entity details fetched from API

page.responsibility: Thin wrapper, imports and renders MC{Entity}DetailContainer

container.responsibility: Data fetching via custom hook, loading/error states, navigation on error, passes entity to Component

component.responsibility: Pure UI displaying entity data in read-only panels. Receives entity object via props.

validation_checklist: Page file only imports and renders Container — no hooks, no logic
Container fetches entity via use{Entity} custom hook
Container shows MCCircularLoader while isFetching or entity is null
Container uses useEffect to handle fetch error: fireCollapsibleError + navigate away
Component receives entity as a prop — no useQuery, no useNavigate inside
Component renders read-only panels (MCFormPanel) — no Formik
All user-facing strings use t() from useTranslation
Action buttons (edit, delete) trigger navigation or dialog open via callbacks from Container

patterns.name: Create Page Pattern
patterns.description: Entity creation form with MCFormLayout, Formik, mutation, navigation, and error handling.
patterns.when: Building a page to create a new entity

page.responsibility: Thin wrapper, imports and renders MC{Entity}CreateContainer

container.responsibility: Fetches form dependencies, sets up mutation, computes initialValues, handles navigation and error/success toasts. Wraps form in MCFormLayout.

component.responsibility: Pure Formik form with panels and fields. Receives initialValues, onSubmit, and mode='create' via props.

validation_checklist: Page file only imports and renders Container — no hooks, no logic
Container fetches form dependencies and shows MCCircularLoader while loading
Container computes initialValues in useMemo from dependencies
Container provides handleSubmit with mutation, fireSuccess, and navigation to list page
Container wraps form in MCFormLayout with breadCrumbs and onClose
Container handles dependency fetch error via useEffect + fireCollapsibleError + navigate away
Form component receives initialValues, onSubmit, mode via props — no data fetching
All user-facing strings use t() from useTranslation
Submit button has disabled={isSubmitting} to prevent double submission

form_structure.validation: Yup schema in separate file ({entity}FormSchema.ts) or inline constant
form_structure.submission: msmAPI mutation (useCreate{Entity}) in Container, passed as onSubmit prop
form_structure.error_handling: fireCollapsibleError in Container's catch block; field-level Yup validation on blur

patterns.name: Page → Container → Component Architecture
patterns.description: Mandatory 3-layer separation. Page is a thin wrapper, Container handles data/logic, Component is pure UI.
patterns.when: Every new feature MUST follow this pattern
rules: Page: Only imports and renders the Container. No hooks, no logic, no props.
Container: All hooks (data fetching, navigation, i18n, alerts). Computes props for Component.
Component: Pure UI. Receives all data via props. No data fetching. No navigation.

page.responsibility: Thin wrapper file. Only imports and renders the Container. No hooks, no logic, no props, no state. Exists solely as the route entry point.

container.responsibility: All data fetching (tRPC, msmAPI, custom hooks), all React hooks (useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo), navigation (useNavigate), i18n (useTranslation), alerts (useInAppAlert), error handling. Computes and passes props to Component.

component.responsibility: Pure UI rendering. Receives ALL data via props. No useQuery, no useNavigate, no useTranslation (unless for local UI labels). No side effects. Must be testable in isolation with mock props.
imports: MC* UI components from design system

validation_checklist: Page file contains ONLY an import and a render of the Container — no hooks, no logic, no props
Container owns ALL hooks: data fetching, navigation, i18n, alerts, state management
Container does NOT render raw HTML or styled-components for main content — delegates to Component
Component receives ALL data via typed props — no useQuery, no useMutation, no useNavigate inside
Component is testable in isolation by passing mock props — no implicit dependencies
No data fetching (tRPC, msmAPI, fetch) in Component layer
No UI layout logic (MCFormPanel, styled-components) in Container layer beyond layout wrappers (MCContentLayout, MCFormLayout)
Type definitions for Component props live in a separate .type.ts file
Callbacks from Container to Component are passed as props (e.g., onEdit, onDelete, onSubmit)

patterns.name: Edit Page Pattern
patterns.description: Entity edit form that fetches existing data, pre-populates the form, and performs an update mutation.
patterns.when: Building a page to edit an existing entity
rules: Always fetch entity data before rendering the form
Show MCCircularLoader while data is loading
Navigate to detail page on success (not list page, unlike create)
Use 'message.update.success' / 'message.update.error' for i18n keys
Reuse the same Form component as create with a mode='edit' prop
Map entity API response to form initialValues in useMemo

page.responsibility: Thin wrapper, imports and renders MC{Entity}EditContainer

container.responsibility: Fetches existing entity, computes initialValues from entity data, sets up update mutation, handles navigation to detail page on success, error handling

component.responsibility: Pure Formik form with panels and fields. Receives initialValues, onSubmit, and mode='edit' via props.

file_checklist: src/i18n/locales/en/form.{entity}.json (reused from create — add update keys)
validation_checklist: Page file only imports and renders Container — no hooks, no logic
Container fetches entity via use{Entity} hook before rendering form
Container shows MCCircularLoader while isLoading or initialValues is undefined
Container computes initialValues in useMemo by mapping entity fields to form values
Container provides handleSubmit with update mutation (useUpdate{Entity})
Container navigates to DETAIL page on success (not list page, unlike create)
Container handles fetch error via useEffect + fireCollapsibleError + navigate away
Form component is the SAME component used by create — differentiated via mode='edit' prop
All user-facing strings use t() from useTranslation
i18n keys use 'message.update.success' / 'message.update.error' (not create)

form_structure.submission: msmAPI mutation (useUpdate{Entity}) in Container, passed as onSubmit prop
form_structure.error_handling: fireCollapsibleError in Container's catch block; field-level Yup validation on blur

patterns.name: Error Handling Pattern
patterns.description: Standard error handling with useInAppAlert for both query errors and mutation errors.
patterns.when: Any container that fetches data or performs mutations

container.responsibility: Handles all error states: useEffect for query errors (fireCollapsibleError + navigate away), try/catch for mutation errors (fireCollapsibleError + stay on page), fireSuccess for mutation success

component.responsibility: Renders error UI only when explicitly passed error state via props. Does not catch or handle errors independently.

validation_checklist: useInAppAlert imported and destructured: { fireSuccess, fireCollapsibleError }
Query errors handled via useEffect watching query.error — calls fireCollapsibleError and navigates away
Mutation errors handled via try/catch in handleSubmit — calls fireCollapsibleError and stays on page
Mutation success calls fireSuccess with i18n message before navigation
Error summary strings use t() from useTranslation — not hardcoded English
fireCollapsibleError receives both summary (string) and error (object) for expandable details
useEffect dependency array includes error, fireCollapsibleError, handleClose, and t

patterns.name: Loading State Pattern
patterns.description: Standard loading indicators for different contexts.

container.responsibility: Checks isLoading/isFetching from useQuery and renders MCCircularLoader (full-page) or MCLoader (inline) before passing data to Component

component.responsibility: Receives fully loaded data via props — never sees loading state. Component assumes data is available.

validation_checklist: MCCircularLoader with fillParent used for full-page loading (containers that own the entire view)
MCLoader used for inline/section loading (sub-containers within a page)
No custom spinner or loading text — use MCCircularLoader or MCLoader from design system
Pattern: isFetching || !data ? <MCCircularLoader fillParent /> : <Component data={data} />
Loading state does not flash — avoid showing loader for cached data refetches (use isFetching vs isLoading appropriately)
Submit buttons show disabled={isSubmitting} during mutation — not a separate loader

patterns.name: Route Registration Pattern
patterns.description: 3-step process to register a new route. All three files MUST be updated together.
patterns.when: Adding any new page to the application
rules: Step 1: Add enum value to MERouteKey in src/route/types.ts
Step 2: Add route entry in src/app-builder/route/template/routeTemplate.tsx with path and handle (breadcrumb)
Step 3: Map component in src/apps/{client}/config/route.tsx with allowedRoles

route_config.responsibility: Defines route path structure, nesting, and breadcrumb handle for each route key

route_enum.responsibility: Declares MERouteKey enum values for each route (e.g., {ENTITY}_MAIN, {ENTITY}_CREATE, {ENTITY}_DETAIL, {ENTITY}_EDIT)

route_mapping.responsibility: Maps MERouteKey to page component and allowedRoles. Uses lazy imports for code splitting.

page.responsibility: The page component rendered by the route — thin wrapper importing Container

file_checklist: src/app-builder/route/template/routeTemplate.tsx (add route path, children, and handle with breadcrumb crumb)
src/apps/{client}/config/route.tsx (map route key to page component with allowedRoles)
validation_checklist: All three files updated together — missing any one causes runtime errors
MERouteKey enum values follow SCREAMING_SNAKE convention (e.g., AUCTION_ORDER_MAIN)
Route path follows kebab-case convention (e.g., 'auction-order')
Detail and edit routes use :entityId param (e.g., ':entityId', ':entityId/edit')
Breadcrumb handle.crumb matches i18n key in route.breadcrumb namespace
Page components lazy imported in route.tsx for code splitting
allowedRoles correctly set based on feature requirements
Child routes nested under parent route for correct breadcrumb hierarchy

patterns.name: i18n Usage Pattern
patterns.description: Internationalization with react-i18next. All user-facing strings MUST use i18n.
patterns.when: Any component or container with user-facing text
rules: Namespace convention: 'container.{entity}.{action}' for containers, 'form.{entity}' for forms
Resource files: src/i18n/assets/{lang}/sot-resource.json
Client-specific resources: src/i18n/assets/{lang}/{client}.json
Use t() for simple strings, <Trans> for JSX interpolation
Breadcrumb i18n key: route.breadcrumb.{crumb}

component.responsibility: Uses useTranslation hook with correct namespace. All user-facing strings rendered via t() function. Uses <Trans> for JSX interpolation.

resource.responsibility: Contains all translation key-value pairs organized by namespace (container.{entity}.{action}, form.{entity}, route.breadcrumb.*)

validation_checklist: No hardcoded user-facing strings — all text uses t() from useTranslation
useTranslation namespace follows convention: 'container.{entity}.{action}' for containers, 'form.{entity}' for forms
Dynamic values use interpolation: t('message.deleteConfirm', { name: entity.name })
Plural forms use i18next plural syntax: t('items', { count: items.length })
JSX interpolation uses <Trans> component — not string concatenation
Breadcrumb labels use route.breadcrumb.{crumb} namespace
All new i18n keys added to sot-resource.json under the correct namespace path

patterns.name: Accessibility Pattern
patterns.description: Standard accessibility practices for MSM Portal. All interactive components must be keyboard accessible and screen reader compatible.
patterns.when: Every component and page must follow these practices
rules: All interactive elements must be reachable via Tab key
All actions must be triggerable via keyboard (Enter/Space for buttons, Arrow keys for lists)
Focus must be visible — never remove outline without providing alternative focus indicator
Dialogs must trap focus and return focus to trigger on close
Form fields must have associated labels via htmlFor or aria-label
Error messages must be linked via aria-describedby
Dynamic content updates must use aria-live regions
Color must not be the only way to convey information
All images and icons must have alt text or aria-hidden if decorative
Touch targets must be at least 44×44px (WCAG 2.5.8)

component.responsibility: Applies ARIA attributes, semantic HTML elements, keyboard event handlers, and focus management. Ensures all interactive elements are accessible.

validation_checklist: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) reachable via Tab key
Custom interactive elements have role attribute (e.g., role='button', role='tab', role='dialog')
All actionable elements have aria-label or visible text label
Form fields linked to error messages via aria-describedby
Dialogs trap focus inside and return focus to trigger element on close
Keyboard handlers: Enter/Space for buttons, Escape for dialogs, Arrow keys for lists/tabs
Dynamic content updates use aria-live='polite' or role='alert' for screen reader announcement
Color is not the sole indicator of state — icons or text accompany color changes
Decorative icons have aria-hidden='true', functional icons have aria-label
Touch targets are at least 44x44px per WCAG 2.5.8

patterns.name: Navigation Pattern
patterns.description: Route navigation using generatePathForRoute and useEntityParam.

page.responsibility: Route entry point — registered in route config and rendered by React Router

container.responsibility: Owns all navigation logic: useNavigate for programmatic navigation, useEntityParam for route params, generatePathForRoute for type-safe path generation

component.responsibility: Receives navigation callbacks as props (e.g., onEdit, onClose, onRowClick). Does not call useNavigate directly.
imports: MC* UI components — no react-router imports

file_checklist: src/route/types.ts (MERouteKey enum for type-safe route references)
validation_checklist: useNavigate used for programmatic navigation — never window.location or window.history
generatePathForRoute(MERouteKey.{ENTITY}_{ACTION}, params) used for type-safe path building
useEntityParam() used to extract current route params for path generation
Navigation callbacks passed to Components as props — Components do not import useNavigate
navigate(-1) used for back/close navigation — not hardcoded paths
Query params preserved or set explicitly when navigating (e.g., ?tab=draft)
Breadcrumbs configured via route handle.crumb in routeTemplate.tsx

page_blueprints.description: Complete structural blueprints for each page type. Agents should use these when scaffolding new pages.

entity_list.description: List page with table, tabs, filters, and search
ui_structure: MCBarTabs for tab navigation (available | draft | archived)
MCI18nTable with data, columns, filters, hiddenColumns
state_management: React Query cache for list data
entity_list.data_flow: useQuery → converter.backward(proto) → model array → useMemo sort → table
entity_list.error_handling: useEffect watching query.error → fireCollapsibleError({ summary, error })

entity_detail.description: Detail page showing single entity with read-only panels
state_management: React Query cache for single entity
entity_detail.data_flow: useQuery(readEntity) → converter.backward(proto) → model → panel components via props
entity_detail.error_handling: useEffect watching query.error → fireCollapsibleError, redirect on 404

entity_create.description: Create page with Formik form, validation, and API mutation
entity_create.data_flow: initialValues → Formik → user edits → onSubmit → formConverter.forward(values) → createEntity API → navigate to list on success
entity_create.error_handling: mutation.onError → fireCollapsibleError, Formik field-level validation on blur

entity_edit.description: Edit page that fetches existing data, pre-populates form, and updates
entity_edit.ui_structure: Same as create, but form is pre-populated with fetched data
state_management: React Query for initial data fetch
entity_edit.data_flow: useQuery(readEntity) → converter.backward(proto) → formInitialValues → Formik → user edits → onSubmit → formConverter.forward(values) → updateEntity API
entity_edit.error_handling: query.error → redirect or error display, mutation.onError → fireCollapsibleError

settings.description: Settings page with sidebar navigation and nested routes
ui_structure: MCCollapsibleNavbar in sidebar with setting sections
settings.data_flow: URL route → render setting container → fetch setting data → display/edit form
